subcodes.first_line: O thou dear maidservant of God! The question of the Mashrak-el-Azkar is very important and is superior to every matter... ...Today, in America, no matter is greater for the elevation of the Word of God
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @martyrs and martyrdom, @call to action, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
